_comment: SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §8 seam 14 / §11 OQ-1 RATIFIED (a): every admin string keyed from commit one; this catalog ships EN-only (staff-only audience, internal operators) pending the exception's own record in tools/i18n-lint/i18n-lint.mjs. Flipping to the product's x4 locale set later is translation data, zero rework.

entries.admin.page.title: Svac Admin
entries.admin.notfound.title: Not found
entries.admin.signin.title: Staff sign-in
entries.admin.signin.body: Sign in with your staff account. MFA is required.
entries.admin.dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
entries.admin.dashboard.body: This is a scaffold stub. Tiles (config-change events, purge runs, stream volumes, staff sign-ins, aiml.route_decided) register here in Phase 2 (SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §8 seam 2).
entries.admin.staff_roles.title: Staff & Roles
entries.admin.staff_roles.body: Provision, deactivate, reactivate staff accounts, and grant or revoke the six StaffRole roles. Every action is audited and requires a reason.
entries.admin.staff_roles.access_denied: You do not have access to view staff accounts.
entries.admin.staff_roles.provision.title: Provision a new staff account
entries.admin.staff_roles.provision.external_sub: Entra subject (oid) or devseams fixture id
entries.admin.staff_roles.notice.four_eyes_requi: A second approver is required for this action.
entries.admin.staff_roles.notice.duplicate: That email or subject is already provisioned.
entries.admin.staff_roles.notice.error: The action could not be completed.
entries.admin.config.title: Config Registry
entries.admin.config.body: Every 9A config entry, typed and desk-editable. Founder-scope edits walk a confirm-with-reason interstitial; ops-scope edits take an inline reason; set-scope entries are display-only.
entries.admin.config.display_only: Set at build time — display only
entries.admin.config.notice.four_eyes_required: A second approver is required for this action.
entries.admin.config.notice.error: The edit could not be completed.
entries.admin.config.excluded.title: Deliberately not seeded (SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §4)
entries.admin.config.excluded.nakama_rep_floor.r: units await INTEG calibration — a key with an unratified unit is fabrication
entries.admin.config.excluded.epsilon_budget.rea: the review itself defers ε-budget-per-principal to pre-G3.5b
entries.admin.config.excluded.annual_premium.rea: annual Premium pricing is deferred ("annual later")
entries.admin.config.confirm.title: Confirm this founder-scope change
entries.admin.config.confirm.body: This is a founder-scope config key. Review the change below, then confirm explicitly. Key:
entries.admin.config.confirm.age_gate_lowering_w: Lowering this value weakens the age-gate challenge threshold. Confirm carefully.
